CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE ext_table3
(
	first_name VARCHAR(4000),
	last_name VARCHAR(4000),
	gender VARCHAR(4000),
	email VARCHAR(4000),
	phone VARCHAR(4000),
	loyalty_tier VARCHAR(4000) ,
	signup_date VARCHAR(4000)
)
with (
	LOCATION = 'CSV_FILE',
	DATA_SOURCE = external_source,
	FILE_FORMAT = csvheader
)

SELECT * FROM ext_table
select * from sys.external_data_sources where name  = 'external_source'


SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats where name = 'csv_format'

select * from ext_table2

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT csvheader
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS (FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',FIRST_ROW = 2)
);

SELECT *
FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK '/samples_External_files/dim_product.csv',
		DATA_SOURCE = 'external_source',
        FORMAT='CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION='2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
) AS data;

select * from ext_table1


-- EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE AND SCOPED CREDENTIAL EXAMPLE 

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE MySource
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'https://myaccount.dfs.core.windows.net/mycontainer',
    CREDENTIAL = MyCredential
);


CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL MyManagedIdentityCred
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'; -- SYNAPSE WILL AUTOMATICALLY ACCESS NO NEED FO RSAS OR ACCESS KEY JUST ALLOW STORAGE BLOB DATA CONTIRBNUTOR TO SYNAPSE WORKSPACE ON THAT SOTRAGE ACCOUNT 


-- MASTER KEYFOR SYNAPSE EK DATABASE ME SIRF EK MASTER KEY YEH BASICALLY CREDENTIALS KO EMNCRYPT KRKE STORE KRTIU NA KI PLAIN TEXT (SCOPED CREDENTIAL DATA SOURCE ETC )
CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = 'YourStrongPassword123!';

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT csvheader
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS (FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',FIRST_ROW = 2)
